issueDrawer.severityHint: Severity is an estimated triage score from detection size + confidence — calibrate against crew feedback.
issueDrawer.waterloggingNote: Waterlogging clears with weather, not a repair crew — no assignment needed. Recurring flooding at this spot is flagged for drainage/disaster-management review.
issueDrawer.readOnly: Read-only access — sign in as an admin or ward officer to update this issue.
issueDrawer.verifiedFixedNote: ✓ Verified fixed — cleared on a later pass with no re-detection.
issueDrawer.fastTurnaround: 🎉 Fixed in {{time}} by {{contractor}} — fast turnaround, nice work.
issueDrawer.openMiss: ⏳ Open {{days}} days, unresolved — logged as a miss for {{contractor}}.

crewModal.name: Name
crewModal.allAtCapacity: All {{type}} specialists are at capacity — no one available right now.
crewModal.wardContractorHint: Ward {{ward}} · {{area}} — every repairable issue in the ward goes to this crew

login.resetHint: This is a static prototype with no SMS/email backend, so the reset code is shown on screen instead of being sent to your phone.
login.demoResetCode: Demo reset code: {{code}} (shown here since no SMS/email is wired up)
login.passwordResetDone: Password reset. You can log in now.

cityView.title: Mumbai — street-condition survey
cityView.sub: Every BMC ward, sensed by the bus fleet. Click a ward to drill in.
cityView.openWardsShaded: {{count}} open · wards shaded by health score

wardsView.sub: {{count}} BMC administrative wards — pick your area of responsibility.
wardsView.clickToOpen: click to open the ward officer view

wardView.noWardHint: No ward "{{wardId}}" — pick one from the Wards list.
wardView.sub: Ward officer view — resolution queue for open issues, highest priority first.
wardView.contractorHint: one crew responsible for every repairable issue in Ward {{ward}}
wardView.removeContractorConfirm: Remove {{name}} as contractor for Ward {{ward}}? Existing assignments stay as-is; new issues fall back to per-type assignment.
wardView.clickCorridor: click a corridor for its full issue list
wardView.allClear: No open issues in this ward. All clear.

streetView.subScoped: {{count}} corridors in Ward {{ward}} — issues aggregated along each road segment.
streetView.subAll: {{count}} corridors across {{wards}} wards — issues aggregated along each road segment.
streetView.noIssuesYet: No issues detected on this corridor yet.
streetView.fleetCoverageHint: buses that have surveyed this corridor — click a trip to replay it
streetView.noFleetPasses: No fleet passes logged on this corridor yet.

catView.sub: One category across every ward, ranked for the responsible department.

crewView.sub: Field repair & cleanup teams — one specialism each, worklist drawn from the same confirmed-issue set.
crewView.rosterHint: {{count}} members · click a member to see their worklist
crewView.name: Name
crewView.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} ({{id}})? Their open tasks will be reassigned to another {{type}} specialist.

performanceView.sub: Fast fixes worth recognizing, and issues that have sat open too long — same confirmed-issue set, both sides of the story.
performanceView.noFastFixes: No fast fixes yet on this run.
performanceView.noMisses: Nothing has gone unresolved for more than a week — clean sweep.

myWorkView.noCrewRecord: Your account isn't linked to a crew record.
myWorkView.noCrewRecordHint: No matching crew record — ask an admin to check your account.
myWorkView.sub: {{name}} · {{type}} specialist{{ward}} · your resolution queue and history.

fleetList.title: Fleet & route replay
fleetList.subLive: Live detections from the on-bus model — open a trip below to watch the synced replay.
fleetList.subLogged: Per-bus contribution — expand a bus to see its logged trips.
fleetList.contributionHint: {{count}} buses · click a bus to expand its trip log
fleetList.noLoggedTrips: No logged trips for this bus.

tripReplay.sub: Trip on {{date}} — dashcam replay with detections dropping in sync.
tripReplay.noClip: No clip bundled for this trip — map pins still sync to the route timeline below.
tripReplay.pressPlay: Press play — confirmed detections along the route appear here as the bus passes them.
